3127290.name: Tiny Duck Hunt 3D
3127290.description:
DISCLAIMER 

Tiny Duck Hunt 3D is not affiliated with, sponsored by, approved by, endorsed by, or in any way connected to Nintendo video game company or Duck Hunt (TM).

FEATURES

  • A nostalgic hand eye coordination activity that's not as messy or too much when you want to relax and enjoy the game

  • Enhanced mixture of 2D and 3D graphic assets with a slight paralax effect

  • Exciting scoring system adds to the fun

  • Unique control system focused on handheld and joypad gaming

  • Suitable for left-handed people

GRAPHICS

Next generation arcade game in a cute cartoon 3D world.

GAMEPLAY

The gameplay includes simple retro-arcade mechanics and modern competitive process. Interesting rounds, reworked levels, bonuses, enemies, bosses. 

CONTROLS

The unique control system "Smart and Convenient" focused on handheld and joypad gaming. You can enjoy the game without a lightgun or mouse. Suitable for left-handed people.

CREDITS

Igor Bronnikov | programming, modeling, animation, level design, management

Alisa Bronnikova | voice acting, gameplay advising, art design

Aleksandr Bronnikov | gameplay advising, product testing

Danyl Vindiuk (danyvin) | music

Eskoma, AlexM76, CuttlefishM, FxProSound, Sound-Ideas, sounddogs | SFX
